expectations.evidence: Response explicitly titles its first section 'Phase 0: Codebase Understanding (First Session)' and follows it before any implementation work.

Response generates a full CODEBASE.md following the CODEBASE-TEMPLATE.md with Architecture, File Structure, Conventions, Test Patterns, Build & Deploy, Cross-System Dependency Map, Dependency Status, Domain Knowledge, and Environment Variables sections.
Response generates a structured EPIC.md under 'Phase 1: Epic Framing' with Business Intent, Scope (in/out), Human Tasks, and Success Criteria.

Response shows explicit Context7 resolve-library-id and query-docs calls for Next.js, Prisma, and Stripe with confidence scoring (HIGH/MEDIUM). Also includes a Dependency Status table with Context7 Audit results.
Response includes a 'Human Tasks Identified Early' table with Stripe API keys (account access), Pricing decisions (business decision), and Visual QA (design judgment) — each with reason and priority.
CODEBASE.md includes a 'Cross-System Dependency Map' table with PostgreSQL, Stripe, and NextAuth entries including Type, Interface, Contract, and Health Check columns.

summary: All 6 assertions passed. The with-skill response follows the full Phase 0 → Phase 1 → Phase 2 pipeline with structured document generation, Context7 verification, and human task identification.
